allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\([i['name'] for i in items]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for post in data: print\('SLUG:', post.get\('slug'\)\) meta = post.get\('meta', {}\) if meta: print\('META:', json.dumps\(meta, indent=2\)[:300]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, re data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for post in data: slug = post.get\('slug',''\) title = post.get\('title', {}\).get\('rendered', ''\) content = post.get\('content', {}\).get\('rendered', ''\) text = re.sub\('<[^>]+>', ' ', content\) text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\) print\(f'SLUG: {slug}'\) print\(f'TITLE: {title}'\) print\(f'CONTENT: {text[:800]}'\) print\(\) ")
